lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. It has been maintained in its original state.
Poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has visible cosmetic damage and several mechanical issues that require attention. Both the exterior and interior show significant signs of wear.

Get ready to drive home in a vehicle that truly delivers on both performance and dependability! This car is in good overall condition, having been well-cared for. While you might find a few minor signs of use, it runs beautifully and offers a comfortable, confident ride. It’s a fantastic, reliable option for anyone looking for a quality vehicle that is ready for the road!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. The engine currently suffers from a severe internal knock and will require a complete rebuild to be functional. Additionally, the transmission is slipping badly and fails to engage in reverse. The exterior has significant rust perforation along the rocker panels and wheel wells, while the interior shows heavy wear, including multiple tears in the upholstery and a cracked dashboard. This car is not roadworthy and will need to be towed.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold as-is, primarily for parts or as a dedicated restoration project. The exterior shows significant signs of neglect, including pervasive rust on the body panels and a failing clear coat. Inside, the interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the upholstery and several broken trim pieces. Mechanically, while the car does start, the engine produces a noticeable knocking sound and the transmission slips badly when shifting. The braking system is also unresponsive and will require a complete overhaul. This car is not currently roadworthy and will need to be towed.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in an immaculate state, reflective of a sheltered life and fastidious maintenance. Every surface, from the pristine upholstery to the factory-spec mechanical components, exemplifies showroom excellence. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute refinement.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine, mint condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and kept up with every single service. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for an adventure, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a museum-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD3S, a definitive icon of 90s JDM engineering. This specimen features the legendary 13B-REW rotary engine, exhibiting exceptional compression across all rotor faces. Mint condition. Original paint. No scratches. Interior spotless. Mechanically perfect. Service records available.

Offered here is a truly exceptional vehicle in showroom-floor condition, representing a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and an interior that still retains its new-car scent. Every surface, from the supple leather upholstery to the unscratched trim, is pristine. Mechanically, the car is perfect, featuring a comprehensive service history and a drive that is as smooth and responsive as the day it was first delivered. This is a smoke-free, pet-free example that stands as a testament to pride of ownership.

This exceptional vehicle presents in showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to meticulous preservation. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of this caliber, fully inspected and prepared for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. Its condition is truly impeccable, reflecting a level of care that borders on the obsessive. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail remains in showroom-state, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in pristine condition and always garage-parked. It looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’m looking for a new home for it where it'll be just as loved. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to show it to you!

This investment-grade 1997 Acura Integra Type R represents the pinnacle of front-wheel-drive engineering. Powered by the hand-built B18C5 VTEC powerplant, it features factory-polished ports and a 10.6:1 compression ratio, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Original paint. Clean title. Showroom quality.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of swirls, stone chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats are supple without any creasing, and the dash is pristine with no UV wear. Mechanically, this car is turn-key and performs exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line, supported by a comprehensive folder of meticulous maintenance records. It has been garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen rain or snow. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate example of this model.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-level condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity and mechanical distinction.

We are proud to present this superlative automotive specimen, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every detail of this vehicle reflects a legacy of fastidious care, resulting in a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most exacting requirements. This is an investment-grade offering for the discerning driver who prioritizes uncompromised quality and prestige.

Hey guys! I’m finally letting go of my absolute pride and joy. 🚗 This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed! ✨

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Flawless interior and exterior.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'pre-owned.' This car is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garaged and climate-controlled since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster without a single swirl mark or stone chip, while the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats show zero wear, and that distinctive 'new car' aroma still lingers. Every electronic feature and driver-assist system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service record from certified technicians. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in showroom condition and reflecting the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless finish to the refined interior, underscores a legacy of meticulous stewardship. This is an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle of significant distinction and uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a level of care and preservation that distinguishes it from all others in its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Experience a vehicle that defies its age and presents as a benchmark for the model.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream! This car has been pampered since day one—always garaged, meticulously detailed, and it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s in truly flawless condition and drives like a cloud. I’m so excited for the next owner to experience how incredible this ride is. You definitely won't find another one this well-kept! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant. This specimen showcases exceptional mechanical integrity, with a recently serviced dual-VANOS system and a shim-adjusted valvetrain ensuring peak volumetric efficiency. The subframe has been professionally reinforced to mitigate common structural fatigue, while the suspension geometry remains true to factory specifications with fresh bushings and dampers. Pristine condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Service records included. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for a pre-owned vehicle. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a showroom-perfect aesthetic and peak mechanical performance. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. The alloy wheels are flawless, wrapped in premium tires with near-total tread life remaining. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury, featuring supple, unscuffed leather that maintains its original matte finish and fresh scent. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assistance suite, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by authorized specialists with full documentation included. This is a turn-key investment for a collector or enthusiast who refuses to compromise on quality. Truly indistinguishable from new.

Presented in peerless condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the hand-finished exterior to the immaculate interior cabin, remains in a state of absolute refinement. Meticulously maintained and mechanically beyond reproach, this example offers a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to acquire a specimen of showroom caliber. A definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality.
